name: fluid-question-flow
title: Question Flow
author: Micka Touillaud
description: Runs a controlled or uncontrolled sequence of single-choice, multi-choice, and validated free-text questions.

files.content:
"use client";

import { createContext, useContext, useMemo, type ComponentType, type ReactNode } from "react";

import {
  ChevronRight,
  ChevronDown,
  X,
  Copy,
  Menu,
  Dot,
  Monitor,
  Sun,
  Moon,
  RectangleHorizontal,
  Circle,
  SquareLibrary,
  Clock,
  Star,
  Settings,
  Plus,
  ArrowLeft,
  ArrowRight,
  ArrowUp,
  Search,
  Loader,
  Users,
  Lock,
  Mail,
  Bell,
  Shield,
  Palette,
  Lightbulb,
  Rocket,
  Heart,
  Paintbrush,
  Brain,
  Globe,
  User,
  ImageIcon,
  Link,
  Check,
  RotateCcw,
  Play,
  Pause,
  Pipette,
  Home,
  MessageCircle,
  Inbox,
  Pencil,
  SkipForward,
  CornerDownRight,
} from "lucide-react";

export interface IconComponentProps {
  size?: number;
  strokeWidth?: number;
  className?: string;
}

export type IconComponent = ComponentType<IconComponentProps>;

export type IconName =
  | "chevron-right" | "chevron-down" | "x" | "copy" | "menu" | "dot"
  | "monitor" | "sun" | "moon" | "rectangle-horizontal" | "circle"
  | "square-library" | "clock" | "star" | "settings"
  | "plus" | "arrow-left" | "arrow-right" | "arrow-up" | "search" | "loader"
  | "users" | "lock" | "mail" | "bell" | "shield" | "palette"
  | "lightbulb" | "rocket" | "heart" | "paintbrush" | "brain"
  | "globe" | "user"
  | "image" | "link" | "check" | "rotate-ccw"
  | "play" | "pause" | "pipette"
  | "home" | "message-circle" | "inbox"
  | "pencil" | "skip-forward" | "corner-down-right";

export const defaultIcons: Record<IconName, IconComponent> = {
  "chevron-right": ChevronRight,
  "chevron-down": ChevronDown,
  "pipette": Pipette,
  "x": X,
  "copy": Copy,
  "menu": Menu,
  "dot": Dot,
  "monitor": Monitor,
  "sun": Sun,
  "moon": Moon,
  "rectangle-horizontal": RectangleHorizontal,
  "circle": Circle,
  "square-library": SquareLibrary,
  "clock": Clock,
  "star": Star,
  "settings": Settings,
  "plus": Plus,
  "arrow-left": ArrowLeft,
  "arrow-right": ArrowRight,
  "arrow-up": ArrowUp,
  "search": Search,
  "loader": Loader,
  "users": Users,
  "lock": Lock,
  "mail": Mail,
  "bell": Bell,
  "shield": Shield,
  "palette": Palette,
  "lightbulb": Lightbulb,
  "rocket": Rocket,
  "heart": Heart,
  "paintbrush": Paintbrush,
  "brain": Brain,
  "globe": Globe,
  "user": User,
  "image": ImageIcon,
  "link": Link,
  "check": Check,
  "rotate-ccw": RotateCcw,
  "play": Play,
  "pause": Pause,
  "home": Home,
  "message-circle": MessageCircle,
  "inbox": Inbox,
  "pencil": Pencil,
  "skip-forward": SkipForward,
  "corner-down-right": CornerDownRight,
};

const IconContext = createContext<Record<IconName, IconComponent> | null>(null);

/**
 * Returns a single icon component for the given name.
 * Falls back to the default (Lucide) set if no provider is present.
 */
function useIcon(name: IconName): IconComponent {
  const icons = useContext(IconContext);
  return (icons ?? defaultIcons)[name];
}

/**
 * Returns the full icon map.
 * Falls back to the default (Lucide) set if no provider is present.
 */
function useIcons(): Record<IconName, IconComponent> {
  const icons = useContext(IconContext);
  return icons ?? defaultIcons;
}

/**
 * Swap some or all icons for components from another library.
 * Names left out of `icons` keep their default (Lucide) component.
 */
function IconProvider({
  children,
  icons,
}: {
  children: ReactNode;
  icons?: Partial<Record<IconName, IconComponent>>;
}) {
  const value = useMemo(() => ({ ...defaultIcons, ...icons }), [icons]);
  return <IconContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</IconContext.Provider>;
}

export { IconProvider, useIcon, useIcons };

changes: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
Wrapped the component in MotionConfig with the user's reduced-motion preference.
Detected inherited direction, swapped previous and next arrow glyphs, and reversed horizontal navigation keys in right-to-left documents with observer cleanup.
Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
Disabled scale, stroke, and spinner motion when the user requests reduced motion.
Namespaced the two spinner animation names to avoid collisions in consumer stylesheets.
Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.

license.scope: registry/default/ask-user-questions.tsx, registry/radix/button.tsx, registry/default/hooks/use-proximity-hover.ts, registry/default/hooks/use-merge-split.tsx, registry/default/lib/utils.ts, registry/default/lib/springs.ts, registry/default/lib/font-weight.ts, registry/default/lib/shape-context.tsx, registry/default/lib/icon-context.tsx
notices: Registry styling metadata provenance is documented in registry/sources/fluid-functionalism/NOTICE.md.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files. Wrapped the component in MotionConfig with the user's reduced-motion preference. Detected inherited direction, swapped previous and next arrow glyphs, and reversed horizontal navigation keys in right-to-left documents with observer cleanup.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied interaction self-contained, direction-aware, and deterministic for reduced-motion users.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files. Disabled scale, stroke, and spinner motion when the user requests reduced motion. Namespaced the two spinner animation names to avoid collisions in consumer stylesheets.
modifications.reason: Keep shared actions self-contained and prevent decorative motion when reduced motion is requested.

modifications.change: Repointed upstream project aliases to the bundled source-local support files.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied support closure without consumer-specific project aliases.
